mapper.sql: id, site_id, matrix_group_id, task_type, task_name, trigger_type, cron_expr, params::text as params, priority, status, last_run_at, next_run_at, last_result, retry_count, max_retries, creator_id, dept_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_operation_tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_operation_tasks ( site_id, matrix_group_id, task_type, task_name, trigger_type, cron_expr, params, priority, status, retry_count, max_retries, creator_id, dept_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{matrixGroupId}, #{taskType}, #{taskName}, #{triggerType}, #{cronExpr}, #{taskParams}::jsonb, #{priority}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetries}, #{creatorId}, #{deptId}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_operation_tasks SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_operation_tasks SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id IN #{id}
